Module rerun::external::re_renderer::external::re_video::decode

source ·
Expand description

Video frame decoding.

Modules§

  • async_decoder
  • av1
    AV1 support.

Structs§

  • AsyncDecoder
    Runs a SyncDecoder in a background thread, for non-blocking video decoding.
  • Chunk
    One chunk of encoded video data; usually one frame.
  • Frame
    One decoded video frame.

Enums§

  • Error
  • PixelFormat

Traits§

  • SyncDecoder
    Blocking decoder of video chunks.
